---
title: 'Uptown Popcorn | Northpark Center (Mall) in North Dallas Texas'
date: '2014-12-15T19:22:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5532143146270320827'
blogger_filename: '/2014/12/uptown-popcorn-northpark-center-mall-in.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
---

<h2 style="text-align: left;">Uptown Popcorn</h2><h3 style="text-align: left;"><a href="http://www.uptownpopcorn.com/">Northpark Mall</a>, North Dallas, Texas </h3><br /><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/uptown-popcorn-43e2dbb23817.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" closure_lm_862149="null" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/uptown-popcorn-43e2dbb23817.png" gta="true" height="126" width="400" /></a></div><br /><h4>Overview</h4>Quaint Little Spot. This small corner boutique is on the top floor of the Northpark Mall in Dallas Texas, just outside the Macy's entrance into the main mall. The inviting colors and unique flavor combinations are sure to delight. <br /><br /><h4>Cost</h4><br />It's a bit on the expensive side, but hey... it's gourmet pop corn, if you wanted the stuff from the Grocery Store, you'd go there. <br /><br /><br /><h4>Kids</h4>There are flavors I'm positive most kids would avoid, such as Dill Pickle or Southwest Jalapeno, and some that they would flock to, such as Pink Cotton Candy and Cookie and Cream!<br /><br /><h4>Tips to enjoy it better...</h4><br />They have Holiday Tins and Gift Boxes for those looking for something original to give. <br /><br /><br /><br /><b>Life In Fort Worth By <a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br /><h4>Blog Connect:</h4><ul><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li><li><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li>Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157639481468746/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></li><li>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></li><li>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></li></ul><h4>Connect:</h4><div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px; text-align: left;"><!-- THIS IS THE CODE FOR FACEBOOK--><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-436ed0b74b58.png" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" /> </a><!-- END OF THE CODE FOR FACEBOOK--><!-- THIS IS THE CODE FOR TWITTER --><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-0d130abda9d2.png" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" /> </a><!--  END OF THE CODE FOR TWITTER --><!-- THIS IS THE CODE FOR YOU-TUBE  --><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-df42b17a5900.jpg" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" /> </a><!-- END OF THE CODE FOR YOU-TUBE --><!-- THIS IS THE CODE FOR YOUR RSS FEED--><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-d57cc3305733.jpg" style="border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-right: 0px; border-top: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" /> </a><!--  END OF THE CODE FOR YOUR RSS FEED--></div><br /><br /><h4>Disclaimers<b>:</b></h4><i>* This information is AS IS. I make no assumptions to know everything, or be up to date. I am a fellow traveler passing on what I learn to you. If you need official assistance from a professional, please get that help from them.&nbsp;</i><br /><i><br /></i><i>*Affiliate Links may be included. In some instances I make money from the reviews of products or services I do here. In some cases I get a few freebies as well. Nevertheless, I only leave my honest reviews. This is how I see it. They can pay me to review, they can't pay me for how my review turns out. Please see my full disclosure list at: <a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start Here - About</a>.&nbsp;</i><br /><h4><b>What is YOUR favorite place to go? Comment Below!</b></h4><div><b><br /></b></div>
